{{Quote|A guf drolg is a large amphibious sauroid native to Talus. It is omnivorous, ill-tempered, and generally hostile.|[[Magur Torigai]]|<ref name="SWG:MT">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Magur Torigai|Rori}}</ref>}}
'''Guf drolgs''' were large hostile [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].

==Description==
Guf drolgs were large and hostile creatures from Talus. During the cold season, they migrated to regions with warmer climates in small groups called "[[Pod (social group)|pods]]." People often hunted them for their meat and [[Leather/Legends|leathery]] hides.<ref name="SWG:GD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=loading|Guf Drolg|Talus}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> zoologist [[Magur Torigai]] hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to kill a Guf drolg that endangered the local ecosystem near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Restuss]] on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].<ref name="SWG:MT" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Guf_drolg_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Guf drolgs appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
